---
title: "v9a_songunet_edm"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.version-page}
::: {.version-hero}
<span class="version-label">v9a / EDM diffusion</span>

# v9a_songunet_edm

This version tests a CorrDiff-style diffusion objective with a SongUNet/NCSN++ backbone instead of direct FM velocity
prediction.
:::

::: {.version-layout}
::: {.version-main}
## Hypothesis

EDM trains a denoiser over a wide noise range:

$$
\mathcal{L}_{EDM}=\lambda(\sigma)\left\|D_\theta(\mathbf{x}+\sigma\epsilon,\sigma,c)-\mathbf{x}\right\|_2^2.
$$

The goal is to compare a proven diffusion downscaling objective against residual Flow Matching.

{{< include _variable-results.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.version-side}
## Parameters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Backbone | SongUNet / NCSN++ |
| Objective | EDM denoising |
| Target | `HR - mu` residual |
| Patch size | `256` |
| Model channels | `128` |
| Sigma range | `0.002` to `80` |

## References

- [EDM](../methods/edm.html)
- CorrDiff-style generative downscaling
:::
:::
:::
